summary: Transportation/travel website with OTP verification, distance-based pricing calculation, and time tracking for trips
architectural_notes: Pricing engine dependent on distance and time metrics
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Hero banner showing modern transportation vehicle on a road with warm sunset lighting (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Icon representing OTP verification with shield and checkmark design (otp-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Icon showing distance calculation with road and distance marker (distance-icon.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Create booking flow interface with OTP input form for trip verification
Build trip details input form capturing distance and time information
Create cost display component showing price breakdown including distance charges, time charges, and total fare
Design a clean, modern visual theme with transportation-focused aesthetics using warm earth tones and clear typography that emphasizes usability for travel booking interfaces

new_feature_requests.summary: OTP generation and verification system for user authentication
Trip cost calculator based on distance traveled and time taken
Distance and time tracking system for trips
Implement OTP generation system that creates a unique 6-digit verification code for each trip booking request
Implement OTP verification system that validates user-entered codes before confirming trip bookings
Create trip cost calculation system based on distance traveled and total time taken
Build trip tracking system that records distance traveled and time duration for each trip
